summary: Final comprehensive test of all 14 bug fixes from codebase audit. 16/16 tests pass (100%). BUG 2 (auth onboarding / DEFAULT_USER), BUG 5+6+14 (goal-specific exercise filtering), BUG 8 (settings save / apply-injury-update), and all regression endpoints confirmed working.
critical_code_review_comments: NOTE: IntakeRequest schema uses 'goal', 'experience', 'injuries', 'gym' (not 'trainingGoal', 'experienceLevel', 'injuryFlags', 'equipment'). Frontend must ensure it sends the correct field names or 422 errors will silently block profile creation.

NOTE: GET /api/profile response does NOT include a 'userId' field — user isolation is enforced via JWT at the DB query level (correct), but if any endpoint ever needs to return userId it must be explicitly added to the response schema.
seed_data_creation: Registered fresh_user_c@test.com / TestC123 as new user. Called POST /api/profile/intake to create their profile. Called POST /api/plan/apply-injury-update to set Lower Back injury.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 14 bug fixes confirmed working. Key schema: IntakeRequest fields are goal/experience/injuries/gym (not trainingGoal/experienceLevel/injuryFlags/equipment). apply-injury-update key is 'newInjuryFlags'. BUG 2 fix (upsert=True) confirmed: new user profile.userId is NOT 'user_001'. BUG 5+6+14: knee injury does not produce Box Squat; shoulder injury does not produce Floor Press. BUG 8: apply-injury-update returns 200 after intake. All regression endpoints (weekly-review, deload/check, rehab/status, competition/status, rotation/check, warmup/today, coach/change-log, plan/session/today) return 200.
rca_of_issue: N/A — all bugs confirmed fixed. Test failures were test script issues (wrong field names in request payload: used trainingGoal/injuryFlags/experienceLevel/equipment instead of goal/injuries/experience/gym per IntakeRequest schema).
